originalTitle: Review & Preview: Blame It on the Fed
summary: Stocks tumbled on Wednesday after Kevin Warsh’s first press conference as chairman of the Federal Reserve. Warsh said he wasn’t concerned with the market’s reaction to his debut, which is for the best, given the Dow Jones Industrial Average slid 1% while the S&P 500 fell 1.2% and the Nasdaq Composite lost 1.3%. Interest rate increases are one of Wall Street’s concerns, and those seem to be on the table, potentially as soon as this fall, opines Capital Economics’ Chief North America Economist Stephen Brown.
content: Stocks tumbled on Wednesday after Kevin Warsh’s first press conference as chairman of the Federal Reserve. Warsh said he wasn’t concerned with the market’s reaction to his debut, which is for the best, given the Dow Jones Industrial Average slid 1% while the S&P 500 fell 1.2% and the Nasdaq Composite lost 1.3%. Interest rate increases are one of Wall Street’s concerns, and those seem to be on the table, potentially as soon as this fall, opines Capital Economics’ Chief North America Economist Stephen Brown.
chineseTitle: 回顾与前瞻：归咎于美联储
chineseSummary: Stocks tumbled on Wednesday after Kevin Warsh’s first press conference as chairman of the Federal Reserve.沃什表示，他并不担心市场对他首次亮相的反应，鉴于道琼斯工业平均指数下跌 1%，标准普尔 500 指数下跌 1.2%，纳斯达克综合指数下跌 1.3%，这是最好的结果。凯投宏观(Capital Economics)北美首席经济学家斯蒂芬·布朗(Stephen Brown)表示，加息是华尔街担忧的问题之一，而且这些问题似乎最早可能在今年秋天就摆在桌面上。
chineseContent: Stocks tumbled on Wednesday after Kevin Warsh’s first press conference as chairman of the Federal Reserve.沃什表示，他并不担心市场对他首次亮相的反应，鉴于道琼斯工业平均指数下跌 1%，标准普尔 500 指数下跌 1.2%，纳斯达克综合指数下跌 1.3%，这是最好的结果。 Interest rate increases are one of Wall Street’s concerns, and those seem to be on the table, potentially as soon as this fall, opines Capital Economics’ Chief North America Economist Stephen Brown.
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
